text:
うむ、よろしい！
皆の見る目と私の見る目に
間違いはなかったようだ！

実力を得たとしても
一切の油断なく任務に取り組む……
アークスの鑑だな、うんうん！

その志を忘れずに、これからも
精進していくんだぞ！

思えば、私も昔は自分の力を
過信しすぎたことも

Top notch! Looks like the folks 'round here had
you pegged right. As did I!

Your fellow operatives could take a page from
your book. You kept on guard and did your
duty, while knowing what best for you to do.
Never lose that spirit! Keep striving, kid!

Oh, I could talk your ear off 'bout the
overconfident young operative I used to be,
back in the day...
